title: ceratostylis glabra
intro: Ceratostylis glabra, also known as the smooth orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The smooth orchid has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceratostylis glabra include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic benefits.
